Duan Xiaolou (Zhang Fengyi) and Cheng Dieyi (Leslie Cheung) grew up together as brothers. One acted as a female actor and the other acted as a female actor. They have always worked together flawlessly, especially in "Farewell My Concubine", which became famous in the capital. For this reason, the two agreed to co-star in "Farewell My Concubine" for the rest of their lives. However, the two have fundamentally different understandings of the relationship between drama and life. Duan Xiaolou understands that drama is not life, while Cheng Dieyi is indifferent between drama and drama.

Forrest Gump (played by Tom Hanks) was born in a remote town in Alabama in the south of the United States shortly after the end of World War II. He was born mentally retarded with an IQ of only 75. However, his mother was a woman with a strong personality. She often encouraged Forrest Gump that "foolish people are blessed" and asked him to strive for self-improvement.
                                    
                                Forrest Gump went to school like an ordinary child, and met his lifelong friend and love Jenny (played by Robin Wright Penn). Under the love of Jenny and her mother, Forrest Gump started running non-stop throughout his life with the "scud" given by God.
                                    
                                Forrest Gump became a rugby superstar, a Vietnam War hero, a table tennis diplomatic envoy, and a billionaire. However, he could never forget Jenny. Several hasty reunions and partings deepened Forrest Gump's miss.
                                    
                                One day, A-Gump received a letter from Jenny, and they finally met again...

description:
Lyon (played by Jean Reno) is a lonely professional killer who is hired by others. One day, the little neighbor girl Matilda (Natalie Portman) knocked on his door and asked to stay with him to avoid the danger of murder. It turns out that the owner of the neighbor's house was an informant of the police anti-narcotics team. He was punished by the police (Gary Oldman) who killed his entire family just because he embezzled a small package of drugs. Matilda was rescued by Lyon, survived, and stayed with Lyon. Lyon taught the little girl how to use a gun, and she taught Lyon French. The relationship between the two became increasingly close and they got along harmoniously.
                                    
                                The girl wanted to take revenge, but was caught instead. Leon arrived in time and rescued the girl. The battle between good and evil, mixed with sorrow, resentment, love and hatred, is gradually escalating, and greater conflicts are inevitable...

description:
The Jewish young man Guido (Roberto Bernini) meets the beautiful female teacher Dora (Nikoleta Braschi). He politely bows to Dora: "Good morning! Princess!". After many ridiculous twists and turns, God fulfilled his wish and the two lived happily together.
                                    
                                However, the good times did not last long. Under the fascist regime, Guido and his son were forcibly sent to a Jewish concentration camp. Although Dora had no Jewish ancestry, she walked resolutely and was detained in a concentration camp separately from her husband and son. The smart and optimistic Guido coaxes his son that this is just a game, and the prize is a big tank. His son lives happily and innocently in the haze of the Nazis. Despite the hardship and loneliness of life in the concentration camp, Guido still brought a lot of happiness to others. He also took the opportunity to greet his wife on the Nazi radio: "Good morning! Princess!"
                                    
                                The fascist regime is about to overthrow, and the Nazi concentration camps will soon undergo final liquidation. How will the game Guido compiled for his son end? Can their family survive this dark age safely?

description:
On April 10, 1912, the luxury liner Titanic, known as the "miracle in the history of world industry", began her maiden voyage from Southampton, England to New York, the United States. Rich girl Rose (Kate Winslet) boarded the first-class cabin with her mother and fiancé Carl; on the other hand, the bohemian young painter Jack (Leonardo DiCaprio) also won a lower-class ticket in a gamble at the pier.
                                    
                                Rose was tired of the hypocritical life in the upper class and was unwilling to marry Carl. She planned to commit suicide by throwing herself into the sea, but was rescued by Jack. Soon, the beautiful and lively Rose fell in love with the handsome and cheerful Jack. Jack took Rose to a dance in the lower cabin and took her portrait, and their relationship gradually heated up.
                                    
                                April 14, 1912, Sunday night, a calm night. The Titanic hits an iceberg, the "unsinkable" Titanic faces the fate of sinking, and the budding love between Rose and Jack will also experience the test of life and death.

title: Schindler's List Schindler's List
leader: ['Liam Neeson', 'Ben Kingsley', 'Ralph Fiennes', 'Caroline Goodall', 'Jonathan Sagal', 'Albers Davids', 'Margotha ​​Goebel', 'Mark Ivanne', 'Beatrice Makola', 'André Severin', 'Friedrich von Thun', 'Kzisztof Rafter', 'Norbert Weisel']
description:
In 1939, Poland was under the rule of Nazi Germany, and the SS segregated the Jews. German businessman Oscar Schindler (Liam Neeson) came to Krakow under German rule and opened an enamel factory to produce military supplies. With his outstanding social skills and a large amount of money, Schindler established a good relationship with the German army. His factory hired Jews to work and made a lot of war fortune.
                                    
                                In 1943, the Jews in Krakow suffered a tragic massacre. Schindler was greatly shocked when he witnessed all this. He bribed the officers to let his factory become a labor camp affiliated with the concentration camp. During those days of crazy massacre, his factory also became a refuge for Jews.
                                    
                                In 1944, on the eve of Germany's defeat, the massacre of Jews became more and more crazy. Schindler issued a list of 1,200 people to the German army officers and spent all his money to buy the lives of these Jews. In those dark days, to save one person was to save the whole world.

This film tells the life of a legendary piano genius.
                                    
                                In 1900, on the Virginian luxury cruise ship, an orphan was abandoned in the first-class cabin. He was raised by the sailors on the ship and named 1900 (played by Tim Roth). As 1900 grew up, he showed his extraordinary talent for playing the piano without a teacher. He performed piano in the band on the ship, and everyone who heard him play was deeply moved. Jenny, the originator of jazz, heard about 1900's superb skills and went on the boat to compete with him. In the end, he felt ashamed and left sadly.
                                    
                                Unfortunately, all these things happened at sea. 1900 never wanted to set foot on land, until one day, he fell in love with a girl, and his love flowed on the piano keys. Will he set foot on land to start a new life for love and amaze the world with his music? How will he write his extraordinary life.

title: The Truman Show The Truman Show
leader: ['Jim Carrey', 'Laura Linney', 'Ed Harris', 'Noah Emmerich', 'Natasha McElhone']
description:
Truman (Jim Carrey) is an extremely ordinary person. Except for some strange experiences-the sudden disappearance of his first love girlfriend and the sudden disappearance of his drowning father suddenly seem to appear in front of him again, he is no different from most American men in their 30s. This made him feel disappointed. He also tried to leave the place where he had lived for many years, but was always unable to do so due to various reasons.
                                    
                                Until one day, he suddenly realized that he seemed to be being followed, no matter where he went or what he did. This feeling is getting stronger and stronger. Truman decided to escape from the place where he had lived for more than 30 years at all costs to find his first girlfriend.
                                    
                                But he found that he couldn't escape. The truth is actually very cruel.

description:
In 2805 AD, human civilization was highly developed, but the earth was no longer suitable for human habitation due to the massive increase in pollution and domestic waste. The people on earth were forced to leave their hometown in a spaceship and embark on a long and endless journey into the universe. Before leaving, they entrusted Buynlarge's company to clean up the earth's garbage. The company developed a robot named WALL·E (Waste Allocation Load Lifters - Earth) to take on this important task.
                                    
                                These robots work hard day after day and year after year according to the procedures. However, as time goes by and the harsh environment erodes, the WALL·Es are damaged and stop moving one after another. In the end, only one is still working on this seemingly never-ending task. After a long period of time, it began to have its own consciousness. It likes to carefully hide the treasures it collects, and likes to watch musicals from hundreds of years ago after finishing work. In addition, it also has a cockroach friend as a companion. Until one day, a spaceship from the universe broke its unchanging life...
                                    
                                This film won the 81st Academy Award for Best Animated Feature Film in 2009.

description:
Inho (played by Kong You), a mute art teacher from Seoul, came to Wujin and applied for a school for the deaf and mute. When heavy fog fell, he accidentally crashed his car. During maintenance, he met Rouzhen (played by Zheng Youmei), a member of the human rights organization. Renhao's wife died young and his 8-year-old daughter was born with asthma and was taken care of by his grandmother, so he worked tirelessly to find a job to support him family. However, the twins' principal and dean actually forced Inho to ask for a bribe of 50 million won. At the same time, Renhao gradually discovered that the school was enveloped in a tense and depressive atmosphere, which was suffocating. There are three children who attract attention: the smart Kim Yeon-doo (played by Kim Hyun-soo), the gluttonous Chen Yuri (played by Jung In-su), and Quan Minxiu (played by Baek Seung-hwan), whose younger brother committed suicide. Minxiu always has bruises on his face. After class, Renhao also heard shouting and crying in the women's toilet, but he did not go into details when the guard stopped him. after. He accidentally witnessed the principal bribing the police, the instructor beating Minxiu, and the dormitory instructor drowning and punishing Yandou. A shocking secret was slowly revealed, and the truth shocked South Korea...
                                    
                                This film is based on a real incident in a school for the deaf and mute in Gwangju in 2005, and adapted from the novel of the same name by Korean writer Kong Ji Young.

title: Infernal Affairs Infernal Affairs

Han Chen promised that Liu Jianming would help him be promoted to a trainee inspector in seven years. In 1992, Chen Yongren (Tony Leung), an outstanding student at the police training school, was asked by his superiors to go deep into the Triads as an undercover agent. However, this incident exposed the fact that both parties had undercover agents, and triggered the determination of the top leaders of both parties to eliminate the insiders. title: The Godfather

description:
In the United States in the 1940s, "Godfather" Vito Corleone (played by Marlon Brando) was the leader of the Corleone family of the Mafia. He led the family to engage in illegal activities, but at the same time he was also the patron saint of many weak civilians and was deeply loved by people.
                                    
                                The conflict between the Corleone family and several other New York Mafia families intensified because they rejected the drug lord Soloso's drug deal requirements. On Christmas Eve, Soloso kidnapped Tom, the "Godfather's" consultant, and sent someone to assassinate the "Godfather". Due to the betrayal of the traitor, the "Godfather"'s eldest son Sunni was killed by his enemies; the younger son Mike (played by Al Pacino) was also involved and lost his beloved wife. The conflicts between Mafia families are becoming more and more intense.
                                    
                                How does the old "godfather" lead the overall situation when facing the pain of losing his son? How does the vendetta between the mafia end? Who is the traitor in the family? Who can become the "godfather" of the new generation?
                                    
                                The bloodshed and tenderness are truly staged in this landmark gangster epic.

title: When happiness knocks on the door The Pursuit of Happyness
leader: ['Will Smith', 'Jaden Smith', 'Thandy Newton', 'Brian Howey', 'James Karen', 'Dan Castellaneta', 'Curt Fuller', 'Takayo Fisher', 'Kevin West', 'George Chang', 'David Michael Silverman', 'Dominic Bove', 'Jeff Cullen', 'Joeff Lavin', 'Scott Klaas']
description: Chris Garner (Will Smith) used up all his savings to buy a high-tech treatment device and sold it to hospitals everywhere, but the price was high and not many people accepted it. No matter how hard he tried, he was unable to provide a good living environment for his wife and children, so his wife (Thandie Newton) finally chose to leave home. From then on, he and his son Christopher (Jaden Smith) lived together. Chris finally got an internship opportunity at a stock investment company. Even though he was not paid and had only a 5% chance of success, he still worked hard. His son was his strength. He looked down at her and hid with his son in a public toilet in a subway station, living in a church shelter... He firmly believed that happiness would come tomorrow.

title: Thrilling Flipped
leader: ['Madeline Carroll', 'Callan McAuliffe', 'Rebecca De Mornay', 'Anthony Edwards', 'John Mahoney', 'Penelope Ann Miller', 'Aidan Quinn', 'Kevin Weisman', 'Morgan Lilly', 'Ryan Kerzner', 'Jillian Pfaff', 'Michael Bosa', 'Beau Lerner', 'Jacqueline Evola', 'Taylor Grotius', 'Ellie Bryant', 'Ashley Taylor', 'Israel Broussard', 'Cody Horn', 'Michael Bolton', 'Sean Harper', 'Stephanie Scott', 'Patricia Lentz', 'Matthew Gold', 'Arora Katherine Smith', 'Kelly Donnelly', 'Sofia Thago', 'Michelle Messmer', 'Scott Joel Gizicki', 'Rod Myers', 'Kara Pacitto', 'Katelyn Pacitto']
description: Bryce (Callan McAuliffe) and his family move to a small town, and the girl next door Julie (Madeline Carroll) comes to help. She fell in love with him at first sight and her biggest wish was to get his kiss. The two were classmates, and she kept trying to get close to him, but he avoided her. She likes to climb on the tall plane trees and look at the scenery. But because of construction, the tree was cut down. She defended it to the death, hoping that he would fight side by side, but he backed down. Her deeds were published in the newspapers, and her grandfather was very fond of her, which puzzled him. She won first place in the science and technology exhibition with her chicken-laying project and became the focus of the audience, eclipsing him. She gave him her own eggs, but he secretly threw them away after his family suspected that her eggs were unhygienic. She was very sad when she learned the truth, and their relationship fell to a freezing point. She told her family, which led to a quarrel. It turns out that my father has been saving money to take care of his stupid brother, so he lives in poverty. She understood her parents, took matters into her own hands, and received great help from her grandfather. He apologized to her but did not resolve the issue. He started paying attention to her. The egg turmoil is not over yet, family dinner and lunch boy selection...

title: Intouchables
leader: ['François Cruset', 'Omar Sy', 'Anna René', 'Audrey Fleureau', 'Thomas Soliwell']
description:
Because of a skydiving accident, the white rich Philippe (François Cluzet) is paralyzed in bed and wants to hire a full-time escort. Due to the high salary, there were many applicants, all of whom were eloquent, but they could not move his heart. It wasn't until the appearance of black Driss (Omar Sy) that he made a decision. Driss had just come out of prison and was burdened with family burdens. He just wanted to find a dismissal letter to apply for relief, and he was obviously more interested in the female assistant than this job. But Philip still fell in love with this young man at first sight. So Desis began a one-month trial period. Although the comfortable environment of the mansion made him feel vain, he still faced many challenges: not only had to rehabilitate Philip, but he also had to bathe, enema, open letters, wear stockings, etc. they became friends...
                                    
                                This film is based on real events and won the Golden Kirin Award for Best Film at the 2011 Tokyo Film Festival. Francois Crouse and Omar Sy shared the best actor crown.

title: The Thief of Time The Thief of Time
leader: ['Sandra Ng', 'Simon Yam', 'Zhong Shaotu', 'Li Zhiting', 'Cai Ying'en', 'Qin Pei', 'Xia Ping', 'Gu Dezhao', 'Xu Anhua', 'Zhang Tongzu', 'Zhuang Yufei', 'William Xilu', 'Li Jianxing', 'Lin Yaoqi', 'Liao Ailing', 'Zhang Yidong', 'Qian Yaorong', 'Tan Zanqiang', 'Chen Qinghang', 'Li Xiangrong']
description:
Hong Kong in the 1960s was in a state of rapid change. On the one hand, they have to endure the repression of the British Hong Kong government, on the other hand they are affected by the movements in the mainland, and they have to face typhoons and storms that land from time to time. The time-honored Wynn Street is at the center of such a storm.
                                        
                                    Shoemaker Luo's family of four makes a living by making shoes at the end of the street. Mr. Luo (played by Simon Yam) is a good shoemaker and can only support his family in that chaotic era; Mrs. Luo (played by Sandra Ng) is a spicy and straightforward person, known as the "Sister-in-law Luo". The eldest son Luo Jinyi (played by Li Zhiting) is 16 years old. He has excellent academic performance and is the champion of the sports meeting. He is the hope of the whole family and the pride of Wynn Street. The younger son Luo Jiner (played by Zhong Shaotu) is 8 years old and is doted on by his parents. He has a naughty nature and is famous for being naughty and tricky... The family is living a difficult life, but it is also a happy life.
                                        
                                    However, a pure first love between the eldest son and a wealthy girl Fang Fei (played by Cai Yingen), a hurricane that swept across Hong Kong, and a long-awaited nightmare suddenly changed the peace and happiness of this ordinary family overnight... Facing the biggest "thief" of time, how can a strong and unyielding person resist?
                                        
                                    2010 The 60th Berlin Film Festival "New Generation...
language: Cantonese / Mandarin Chinese / English / Shanghainese / French

title: Seven Samurai Seven Samurai
leader: ['Mifune Toshiro', 'Shimura Joe', 'Tsushima Keiko', 'Shimazaki Yukiko', 'Fujiwara Kamazu', 'Kato Daisuke', 'Kimura Isao', 'Chiaki Minoru', 'Miyaguchi Seiji', 'Kosugi Yoshio', 'Sabu Tsun', 'Inaba Yoshio', 'Tsuchiya Yoshio', 'Takado Kunori', 'Higashino Eijiro', 'Ueda Kichijiro', 'Tatara Yoshijun', 'Watanabe Atsushi', 'Ogawa Toranosuke', 'Yamagata Isao', 'Kamiyama Soto', 'Shimizu Gen', 'Takagi Shinpei', 'Otomo Nobu', 'Takahara Shun'o', 'Inagaki Saburo', 'Sakai Sasaki Chio', 'Sengoku Noriko', 'Honma Fumiko', 'Okubo Masanobu', 'Ito Minoru', 'Omura Senkichi', 'Hirose Shoichi', 'Uno Koji', 'Tani Akira', 'Nakajima Haruo', 'Shimizu Mie', 'Kumatani Takuzo', 'Natsuki Junpei', 'Iwamoto Hiroshi', 'tsutsuki Yasuhisa', 'Mano Muriko', 'Mori Kyoko', 'Kato Takeshi', 'Nakadai Tatsuya', 'Utsui Ken', 'Yamamoto Ren']
description:
During the Warring States Period in Japan, a small mountain village faced the threat of bandits. In order to protect the autumn harvest, the village elders decided to hire samurai to protect the safety of the village, but the only reward was three meals of white rice a day. In the city, they were looked down upon and even beaten by samurai. Until the appearance of Kanbei (played by Shimura Joe), he has now become a ronin. After several considerations, he finally agreed. He told the farmers that at least seven samurai were needed, so six people including Kuzo (Miyaguchi Seiji), Katsushiro (Kimura Isao), Goro (Inaba Yoshio), Shichiro (Kato Daisuke), Heihachi (Chiaki Minori) and Kikuchiyo (Mifune Toshiro) also joined the team, and the seven people were tasked with protecting the village.
                                    
                                Throughout the process of defense preparations, there were many frictions and jokes between the warriors and farmers. During a sneak attack, a samurai was killed with a musket while trying to save the peasants. Soon the bandits' counterattack followed, and a fierce battle was about to begin.

title: Nezha is in the sea
leader: ['Liang Zhenghui', 'Qiu Yuefeng', 'Bike', 'Furunsheng', 'Shanghua', 'Yu Ding']
description:
In the late Shang Dynasty, the wife of Li Jing, the commander-in-chief of Chentangguan, was pregnant for three years and six months, and finally gave birth to a flesh ball, from which a smart and lovely boy jumped out. Li Jingyuan thought he was a monster and wanted to kill him, but fortunately Taiyi came to accept him as his disciple, named him Nezha, and gave him two treasures, the Qiankun Circle and the Huntian Ling. One year, there was a severe drought and the dew did not fall. Nezha and his family will go to the East China Sea to bathe and play. He used Hun Tian Ling to stir up the sea water, shake the Dragon Palace, and provoke Li Gen, the patrolling Yaksha, and Ao Bing, the third prince of the Dragon King. After several disagreements, Nezha killed the two men, causing great disaster. Dragon kings from all over the world gathered in Chentangguan to demand their lives. In order to save the people, Nezha decided to give up his life...
                                    
                                This film is adapted from the story of "The Romance of the Gods" and won the 1980 Hundred Flowers Film Award for Best Art Film; the Ministry of Culture's 1979 Outstanding Film Award and the Youth Outstanding Creation Award; the 1983 Manila International Film Festival Special Award; the 1988 French Bourbolas Cultural Club Youth International Animation Film Festival Jury Award and the Wide Screen Long Animation Film Award.

title: I Am Sam
leader: ['Sean Penn', 'Dakota Fanning', 'Michelle Pfeiffer', 'Diane Wiest', 'Loretta Devine', 'Richard Schiff', 'Laura Dern']
description:
Sam (Sean Penn), who works at Starbucks, is an adult but has the mental level of only a 7-year-old. By chance, he took in a homeless girl. The woman helped Sam give birth to a daughter and then disappeared without a trace.
                                    
                                He named his daughter Lucy (Dakota Fanning) because he liked the Beatles' "Lucy in the Sky with Diamonds" the most. He loved his children very much. As Lucy grew up slowly under Sam's careful care, she found that her father could not understand slightly more complicated stories. She is refusing to grow up and wants to be like her father. The life of father and daughter is so happy.
                                    
                                District education officials discovered this special family. They believed that Sam was unable to take care of Lucy, so they took Lucy away.
                                    
                                The heartbroken Sam wanted to earn Lucy's custody, so he self-righteously went to find the best lawyer in the area...

title: Ready Player One
leader: ['Tye Sheridan', 'Olivia Cook', 'Ben Mendelsohn', 'Mark Rylance', 'Lina Waithe', 'On Morisaki', 'Chia Cheng Chiu', 'Simon Pegg', 'T.J. Miller', 'Hannah Jon-Kamen', 'Ralph Ineson', 'Susan Lynch', 'Claire Higgins', 'Lawrence Spellman', 'Perdita Vickers', 'Isaac Andrews']
description:
The story takes place in 2045, when virtual reality technology has penetrated into every corner of human life. James Halliday (Mark Rylance) single-handedly built a virtual reality game world called "Oasis". Before his death, he announced that he had set an Easter egg in the game.
                                    
                                Wade (played by Tye Sheridan), Aiqi (played by Lena Waithe), Dadong (played by On Morisaki) and Xiu (played by Zhao Jiazheng) are friends in the game. Together with Artemis (played by Olivia Cooke) whom they met later, the five embarked on a journey to find Easter eggs. What they are fighting against is a big capitalist named Nolan Sorrento (Ben Mendelsohn).

title: The Croods
leader: ['Nicolas Cage', 'Emma Stone', 'Ryan Reynolds', 'Catherine Keener', 'Cloris Leachman', 'Clark Duke', 'Chris Sanders', 'Randy Tom']
description:
The primitive man Grug and his family of six live under the protection of his father Grug (voiced by Nicolas Cage). He robs ostrich eggs for food every day, avoids the pursuit of wild beasts, listens to his father narrating the same story every night, and lives an unchanging life in the cave. The eldest daughter Eep (voiced by Emma Stone) is a curious girl who is completely opposite to her father's personality. She is not satisfied with staying in this small cave all her life and wants to pursue the novel world outside the cave.
                                        
                                    Unexpectedly, the end of the world suddenly came, the cave was destroyed, and the family was forced to leave their home and start a new journey. After leaving the cave where they had lived "all their lives", what appeared in front of them was a brand-new, gorgeous but dangerous new world, full of man-eating flowers and plants and strange birds and beasts that they could not name. The family encountered an unprecedented crisis. During the journey, they also met Guy (voiced by Ryan Reynolds), a nomadic tribesman. He has extraordinary creativity and innovative ideas, and helped the Gulu family avoid many difficulties. Along the way, he also invented many "high-tech" products...

title: Across the world Across the world
leader: ['Chow Yun-fat', 'Leslie Cheung', 'Zhong Chuhong', 'Zhu Jiang', 'Zeng Jiang', 'Hu Feng', 'Tang Ning', 'Deng Yijun']
description:
Potty Cake (Chow Yun-fat), Azhan (Leslie Cheung) and Hong Dou (Chung Chung) are all orphans who became international thieves under the cultivation of their adoptive father (Tsang Kong). When he grew up, he became an art thief who helped him make money, and the three of them also recognized a policeman (played by Zhu Jiang) as their godfather.
                                    
                                The famous painting "The Maid of Herring" was stolen from a museum in Paris, France. At the same time, Ahai, Azhan and Hongdou used their agility to steal another famous painting. During the transaction with the French brother, they learned that the famous painting "The Maid of Herring" was in the evil castle. After they successfully stole the painting under the arrangement of Zeng Jiang, the original culprit of the group, Zeng Jiang, conspired with the French brother to set a trap and sent people to hunt down and kill him. Ahai's car collided with the killer speedboat...
                                    
                                The three were separated. A few years later, they reunited in Hong Kong. Ahai was "paralyzed" and lived in Zhu Jiang's house. Azhan and Hongdou were married. Zeng Jiang forced them to steal paintings again...

title: Train to Busan 부산행
leader: ['Gong Yoo', 'Jung Yoo-mi', 'Ma Dong-seok', 'Kim Soo-an', 'Kim Eui-seong', 'Choi Woo-sik', 'Ahn So-hee', 'Choi Kyu-hwa', 'Jung Seok-yong', 'Yisiu-jung', 'Park Myung-shin', 'Jang Hyuk-jin', 'Woo Do-rim', 'Shim Eun-kyung']
description:
The fund manager of a securities company, Shi Yu (played by Kong Yoo), is bright and capable, but he is also a profit-seeking man. His broke up with her over this, and her daughter Xiu An (played by Kim Soo An) became increasingly disappointed with such a selfish father and decided to go to Busan to live with her mother. On Xiu'an's birthday, Shi Yu took time to accompany her daughter on the express train bound for Busan. At the same time, extremely suspicious riots occurred across the city. The government tried its best to conceal the fact that zombies were raging, and even the ignorant train passengers fell into a hell of panic and despair because of the arrival of uninvited passengers. The moment she drove, an infected person rushed into the car, and she quickly transformed into a corpse and carried out a bloody massacre of healthy people wherever she looked. It didn't take long for the zombies to grow exponentially. Shi Yu was forced to struggle with the survivor passengers in the cramped space to survive.
                                    
                                The long journey to Busan is full of murderous intent. In times of crisis, the humanity of each survivor also undergoes a huge test...

title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
leader: ['Frances McDormand', 'Woody Harrelson', 'Sam Rockwell', 'Abby Cornish', 'Lucas Hedges', 'Peter Dinklage', 'John Hawkes', 'Caleb Landry Jones', 'Katherine Newton', 'Kerry Condon', 'Zeljko Ivanek', 'Samara Weaving', 'Clark Peters', 'Nick Searcy', 'Amanda Warren', 'Malaya Rivera-Drew', 'Brandon Thaxton', 'Michael Allen Milligan']
description:
Mildred's (Frances McDormand) daughter was raped and murdered while out, and the marriage between Mildred and her husband Charlie (John Hawkes) came to an end. Now, she and her son Robbie (Lucas Hedges) live a life of dependence on each other. Several months have passed in the blink of an eye, and there is still no sign of the case being solved, and the police seem to have already diverted their attention away from the case.
                                    
                                Mildred, entangled in despair and pain, rented three giant billboards on the side of the highway, accusing the police of incompetence in handling the case, and pointed the finger directly at Police Chief Willoughby (Woody Harrelson). In fact, Willoughby has been hiding the fact that he is terminally ill and will soon die. Because of these three billboards, the lives of Mildred and Willoughby have changed dramatically.

title: heart maze
leader: ['Huo Weimin', 'Wang Xiaotian', 'Luo Yun', 'Yang Yuzhen', 'Sun Li', 'Shao Shengjie', 'Cao Xi'an', 'Jia Zhigang', 'Zhu Ziqing', 'Wang Zichen', 'Zhao Zitong', 'Jia Shizhong', 'Yuan Man', 'Chen Meisheng', 'Zhang Jingsu', 'Ping Ping', 'Jin Zi', 'Zhang Jianjun']
description:
A young man who wanted to break away from the control of his father accidentally killed a gangster from the same village during a dispute and was forced to flee. He never thought that he would escape from his comfortable life in this way, but when he left, he was shocked to find that fate had already closely connected him with his authoritarian father. Whether he left or stayed, he would lose everything.
                                    
                                A left-behind woman who suffered from domestic violence found solace in the arms of her former lover. In the darkness, the desperate woman conspired with her lover to murder her husband, but when the news of the reckless husband's death came, the lover avoided seeing her and denied everything. When a woman falls into despair again and another man appears in her life, he brings more than just care to her...
                                    
                                An old village chief with integrity, strict self-discipline, and careful planning for his old age after retirement. He had been loyal to his faith all his life, but he easily bowed his head in front of his own nature; a stain fell on the blueprint of destiny, and he tried his best to wipe it off, but a black hole opened up and he fell deeply into it.

title: Dallas Buyers Club Dallas Buyers Club
leader: ['Matthew McConaughey', 'Jennifer Garner', 'Jared Leto', 'Steve Zahn', 'Dallas Roberts', 'Kevin Rankin', 'Dennis O'Hara', 'Jane McNeil', 'Griffin Dunne', 'James Dumont', 'Juliet Reeves', 'Steffi Grote', 'J.D. Evermore']
description: In 1986, in Dallas, the United States, homophobic Texas electrician Ron Woodruff (played by Matthew McConaughey) discovered that he was suffering from the "gay disease"-AIDS, and had only 30 days left to live. The AZT (azidothymidine) he used was the only anti-AIDS drug approved by the FDA at the time, but it was extremely toxic. In order to survive, Ron began to research various anti-AIDS prescriptions and alternative treatments, and even smuggled unapproved drugs from around the world. With the help of doctor Sachs (Jennifer Garner) and transvestite Raymond (Jared Leto), Ron began to establish an underground organization called the "Dallas Buyers Club" to provide more "unconventional treatments" for AIDS patients. Many sick gay men also turned to him for help. Naturally, his move was obstructed and pressured by the FDA and drug companies. Ron finally died in September 1992, 2,557 days after he was told he had only 30 days to live. In the past seven years, he has been unremittingly fighting against the disease, the FDA and pharmaceutical manufacturers...

title: Grave of the Fireflies Grave of Fireflies
leader: ['Tatsuki Nu', 'Shiraishi Ayano', 'Shinohara Ryoko', 'Yamaguchi Shumi', 'Hatada Kozo']
description: The war between the United States and Japan broke out, and 14-year-old Seita took his young sister to run for his life. When they arrived at the air-raid shelter, his mother was seriously injured and died not long after. The two brothers and sisters have lived together since then. They had no choice but to seek refuge with their mother's sister. Even though they gave all their belongings to their aunt, when the food was gone, they felt more and more dependent on others. Qingtai decided to take his sister away to live alone. Life in the fire and smoke was not easy. Qingtai stole food everywhere for his sister, but her sister was still severely malnourished...

title: Love Actually
leader: ['Hugh Grant', 'Colin Firth', 'Emma Thompson', 'Keira Knightley', 'Liam Neeson', 'Thomas Brodie-Sangster', 'Bill Nighy', 'Martin Freeman', 'Laura Linney', 'Alan Rickman', 'Chris Marshall', 'Rodrigo Santoro', 'Rowan Atkinson', 'Billy Bob Thornton', 'Martine McGuckian', 'Andrew Lincoln', 'Lucia Moniz', 'Heike Makaki']
description:
This is a comedy mix of 10 love stories:
                                    
                                The little boy who lost his mother was depressed all day long, and his stepfather didn't know how to comfort him. When he learned that his stepson liked the most beautiful girl in school, he enthusiastically encouraged his son to pursue her. In order to win the attention of the little girl, the little boy practiced the drums day and night, just so that he could perform on the same stage with her at the Christmas party. He was so brave that he even bravely broke through the airport security area just to say goodbye for the last time.
                                    
                                The mother of two children faced a marital crisis. Her husband had an affair and gave the necklace to another woman. What he gave her was only a CD of the female singer she loved. She found an excuse and hid in the bedroom in a hurry, holding back her sobs as she sang. He turned around and laughed exaggeratedly, facing the happy face of his beloved daughter. The husband finally came to his senses.
                                    
                                …
                                    
                                There are ten such short stories in total, which warm our hearts.

title: Wild Tales Relatos salvajes
leader: ['Dario Grandinetti', 'Maria Manuel', 'Monica Villa', 'Rita Corteser', 'Julietta Zelberberg', 'Caesar Bordon', 'Leonardo Sbaraglia', 'Walter Donado', 'Riccardo Darling', 'Nancy Dupra', 'Oscar Martinez', 'Maria Oneto', 'Osma Nunez', 'Herman de Silva', 'Erica Rivas', 'Diego Gentile', 'Margarita Morfino']
description: "Wild Stories" is a black comedy composed of six independent short stories of violent revenge. The film is a subversive creation about the out-of-control behavior of human beings. From its weird sense of humor, unique images and bold soundtrack, to its preference for the theme of ordinary people in desperate situations, we can clearly see the similarities between the creations of the South American ghost director Damian Szevoron and Almodovar. Still, Szifron made his own unique voice with the film: a scathing attack on a society plagued by corruption and severe economic and social inequality.

title: Slumdog Millionaire Slumdog Millionaire
leader: ['Dev Patel', 'Shahruba Shukla', 'Yani Kapur', 'Rajandranath Zutesh', 'Jiniva Talwar', 'Freda Pinto', 'Irrfan Khan', 'Azharuddin Muhammad Ismail', 'Ash Mahesh Shedkar', 'Mahesh Manjrekar', 'Malho Mittal']
description:
2006, Mumbai, India.
                                    
                                Indian youth Gemma Malik (played by Dev Patel) is one question away from winning 20 million rupees. How did he do it? A: He cheated; B: He was lucky; C: He was a genius; D: Everything was destined.
                                    
                                This is the life version of the TV quiz show "Who Wants to Be a Millionaire". Gemma Malik was arrested by the police for fraud after she had won 10 million rupees. Under torture, Gemma told the truth about the 10 million rupees he had won - he did know the answer, but that was all he knew!
                                    
                                Gemma, who was born in a slum, lived a difficult life at a young age. However, he, his brother Salim, and the girl Latika (played by Freida Pinto) have experienced decades of changes in India. Every question before seems to be a fragment of Gemma's memory, affecting his memories of family, love and life.
                                    
                                Now, Gemma wants to clear her criminal suspicion on the one hand, and save her love with Latika on the other. Before money and love, can Gemma stay calm and choose the right answer?

title: East evil and West poison East evil and West poison
leader: ['Leslie Cheung', 'Brigitte Lin', 'Tony Leung', 'Jacky Cheung', 'Maggie Cheung', 'Carina Lau', 'Tony Leung', 'Yang Caini', 'Zou Zhaolong']
description:
On the night when his lover (Maggie Cheung) married his brother in anger, Ouyang Feng (Leslie Cheung) sadly left Bai Tuo Mountain and walked into a small town in the desert to become a killer intermediary. His friend, the romantic swordsman Huang Yaoshi (Tony Leung Ka-fai), comes to the town to have a drink with him every year. The news about Mount Bai Tuo during the drinking conversation makes his forgetfulness of the past gradually turn into self-deception.
                                    
                                Huang Yaoshi is only superficially romantic. He is infatuated with Taohua (Carina Lau), the wife of his friend "Blind Warrior" (Tony Leung Chiu-wai), who left him forever after her husband's death; and to the woman Murong Yan (Brigitte Lin) who was obsessed with him, he was unwilling to fulfill the promise he once made casually, which made Murong Yan lost in her own identity. Hong Qi (Jacky Cheung), the village girl (Yang) Caini) and others who formed a short-term "buying murder and killing" relationship with Ouyang Feng also have a painful past that only they know and are unwilling to look back on.

title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
leader: ['Daniel Radcliffe', 'Emma Watson', 'Rupert Grint', 'Gary Oldman', 'Julie Waters', 'Bonnie White', 'David Thewlis', 'Michael Gambon', 'Alan Rickman', 'Maggie Smith', 'Tom Felton', 'Emma Thompson', 'Julie Christie', 'Timothy Spall']
description:
Harry (Daniel Radcliffe) is about to spend his third year at Hogwarts. At this time, news of the prison break of the villain Sirius (Gary Oldman) spread in Aztaban. It is said that Sirius is the friend who betrayed Harry's parents, his godfather, and it seems that Sirius's escape from prison was to find him. The idea of ​​revenge for his parents quietly grew in Harry's heart, and he looked forward to the appearance of Sirius.
                                    
                                The new magic teacher Lupine (David Thewlis) has an unruly personality, has a good relationship with Harry, and has taught Harry many practical ways to against black art. But at this time, a mysterious figure, Wormtail, appeared on his magic map. By chance, all of Harry's father's old friends, Lupine, Wormtail, and Sirius, gathered in the Shrieking Shack. Harry pointed his wand directly defend at Sirius, but he found that the criminal looked at him with love in his eyes...

title: Memento
leader: ['Guy Pearce', 'Carrie-Anne Moss', 'Jo Pantoliano', 'Mark Boone Jr', 'Rush Fegar', 'Joja Fox', 'Stephen Tobolowsky', 'Harriet Sansom Harris', 'Thomas Lennon', 'Callum Keith Rennie', 'Kimberley Campbell', 'Mary Anne Mueller', 'Larry Holden']
description:
How should you face life when your memories are fragmented? This is what happened to the protagonist of this film.
                                    
                                Liner Shelby (Guy Pearce) was attacked by gangsters at home, his wife was brutally raped and murdered, and he also suffered serious brain damage.
                                    
                                After waking up, he found that he was suffering from a rare "short-term memory loss". He could only remember what happened more than ten minutes ago. In order to continue his life and avenge his tragic death, he relied on tattoos, notes, Polaroid snapshots and other scattered little things to preserve his memory, collect clues, and launch a difficult investigation.
                                    
                                During the investigation, Lena met the vulgar barmaid Natalia (played by Carrie-Anne Moss), who seemed to know something of interest to Leonardo; and Teddy (played by Joe Pantoliano), who claimed to be his former good friend, but seemed sneaky and had evil intentions. Who can believe it? Natalia? Teddy? Or himself?

The old couple gradually understood the situation of their children, and their old friends in Tokyo were also not doing well. Only the widowed daughter-in-law Noriko is very filial to the old man. title: Black Hawk Down Black Hawk Down

In 1992, years of tribal wars had devastated the mountains and rivers of the East African country of Somalia, and the people were in dire straits. The resulting famine caused the deaths of 300,000 people. The dictator Mohammed Farah Aidid, who controls the capital Mogadishu, stole relief supplies from international organizations, a move that caused public outrage around the world. The frantic Aidid declared war on international peacekeeping organizations, and the United States sent 160 special forces members to Mogadishu to overthrow the Aidid regime.
                                    
                                This group of passionate soldiers was full of confidence, but due to insufficient intelligence collection, the war fell into a stalemate. In an operation to hunt down two senior officials of the Aidid regime, the special forces encountered stubborn resistance from the Somali militia. The two sides engaged in a fierce confrontation in the city center. A US Black Hawk helicopter was attacked and crashed into the city. The crew was in danger. In order to rescue their companions, a small group of special forces soldiers went deep into the tiger's den. In the next 15 hours, they experienced the most unimaginable Shura field in the world...

description:
Alis (Malcolm McDowell) is a young man who does all kinds of evil. His special hobby is to rape women while listening to Beethoven's symphonies. One time, after he entered a villa and robbed it, he maimed the owner of the villa, a novelist, and ravaged his wife with his special hobby. Later, because he killed a single woman, Alis was imprisoned and received special personality treatment. After he was released from prison, he became completely tired of pornographic things.
                                    
                                But when Alis returned home, the people around him did not change their old view of him. Under the weight of all kinds of discrimination, he ran to a villa in the suburbs to take a breather, but he did not expect that this villa was the novelist's house he had robbed before. As the leader of an anti-government organization, the novelist put Alis under house arrest in order to achieve a certain purpose. When this incident was revealed and the novelist was arrested, his subordinates threatened to restore Alis to his original temperament in order to fight against the government, completely ignoring Alis who shouted "I am completely fine".

description:
In Beijing in the early 1970s, adults were busy "making revolution" and had no time to pay attention to their children. In addition, schools were closed and they had nothing to do. Young people, especially the boys in the military compound, had fun on their own, squandering excess hormones by heckling, fighting, making trouble, and patting their mothers-in-law. Ma Xiaojun (played by Xia Yu) is such a young man. One of his hobbies is to open the lock of other people's homes with a master key and sneak in to have some fun. It is in this way that the photo of the girl Milan (played by Ning Jing) caught Ma Xiaojun's eyes before he did. Through Liu Yiku (played by Geng Le), the "boss" of the hospital, Ma Xiaojun met Milan again, whom he had accidentally glimpsed at the artillery station, and began to officially regard him as the lover of his dreams. However, in Milan's eyes, Ma Xiaojun is just a silly boy, and the person she likes is the mature, steady and handsome Liu Yiku. From then on, Ma Xiaojun ushered in a mixed adolescent life.

Forced, Dawu and his wife Mei Xiang (played by Hirosue Ryoko) moved to the old house and lived a life of poverty. One day, an advertisement attracted Dawu's attention: NK agency, helping travel, high salary and short working hours. Dawu came to the NK agency for an interview. President Sasaki Shengei (played by Yamazaki Tsutomu) decided to hire Dawu without saying a word, but he avoided talking about the work content. Under Dawu's repeated questioning, President Sasaki finally said: It is the work of Nou Kan (Japanese Nou Kan)!

On the one hand, he is uncomfortable with the body, and on the other hand, he has to hide his work from his wife and friends. This is how Xiaolin Dawu's extraordinary work began.

title: Little Forest, Summer and Autumn, Ritaru・フォレスト Summer and Autumn
leader: ['Hashimoto Ai', 'Miura Takadai', 'Matsuoka Mayu', 'Onmizu Yoichi', 'Kirishima Kaien']
description:
The ordinary girl Ichiko (played by Ai Hashimoto) grew up in Komori, a village in Northeastern Japan. This place is far away from the hustle and bustle of the city, surrounded by green mountains and green waters, just like a quiet and pleasant paradise. The villagers work at sunrise and rest at sunset, relying on a pair of hard-working hands to manage a small but comfortable life without competing with the world. Ichiko once traveled to Tokyo, but she was unable to adapt to the fast pace of the city, and eventually returned to the old house where her mother was no longer there. When she was a child, her mother Fukuko used various ingredients from the mountains and fields to make delicacies with random names. While the solid-eyed Ichiko lamented being deceived, she also kept the beautiful memories deep in her taste buds. As if following her mother's footsteps, she incorporates her love for her hometown into the cooking of her food. Surrounded by friends Yuta (played by Takahiro Miura) and Yoshiko (played by Mayu Matsuoka), enjoying a carefree life...
                                    
                                This film is adapted from the manga by Daisuke Igarashi.

title: Small Forest Winter and Spring Chapter Ritaru・フォレスト Winter・Spring

description:
Unable to integrate into the noisy and noisy big city, Ichiko (Ai Hashimoto), an ordinary girl, chose to return to her hometown of childhood - Komori Village in the northeastern region of Japan. There is not too much fashion and civilization here. The locals live a traditional life of sunrise and sunset. They rely on the sky for their food and their hands to manage their lives. Although life is not rich, my heart is full of fulfillment and joy. Influenced by her mother (played by Kirishima Yuki), Ichiko seems to have a particularly strong interest in making various delicious and cheap dishes with her own hands. This film is a masterpiece full of philosophical propositions that Kubrick spent four years making. A large black stone stands in front of prehistoric humans. They have just begun to understand tools and have entered a milestone in evolution. The same black stones still appear in many places in the universe. They stand on the moon and float in space, carrying some mysterious meaning.
                                    
                                The time is now 2001. In order to find the origin of the Black Stone, humans have launched a Jupiter landing plan. There are three hibernating astronauts on the spacecraft, Captain David (Keir Dullea), pilot Frank (Gary Lockwood), and a highly intelligent computer called "HAL9000". Now, David is the only one left in the vast universe, heading towards Jupiter. But on the first day, Kikujiro lost all the money given by his wife, so the two had to walk to Aichi.
                                    
                                After hitchhiking and causing a lot of trouble, Kikujiro finally took Masao to his mother's house, but the little boy was very depressed. On the way back, Kikujiro tried to comfort him. The two had a great time, and the summer passed just like that.

title: Love at sunset Before Sunset
leader: ['Ethan Hawke', 'Julie Delpy', 'Vernon Dobchev', 'Louise Lemoine Torres', 'Rodore Pauley', 'Marianne Presteiger', 'Diabolo', 'Danny Fra', 'Albert Delpy', 'Mary Perry']
description:
Nine years ago, Jesse (Ethan Hawke) and Celine (Julie Delpy) met unexpectedly on a train and were heartbroken. After a crazy and romantic night in Vienna, they broke up before sunrise and met again in Vienna.
                                    
                                Nine years later, Jesse has become a best-selling author, and Celine is a member of a French environmental organization. What Jesse recounts in his new book is the romantic night nine years ago. While promoting a new book in Paris, Jesse and Celine met in a bookstore. However, they only had one afternoon together. Before sunset, Jesse had to fly back to the United States. The two of them walked in the streets of Paris in the afternoon and went boating on the beautiful moat. a trick of fate, happy time is as intoxicating but short-lived as fireworks.
                                    
                                Jesse sent Celine back again and again, unforgettable; Celine used guitar and singing to remember the love deep in her heart. The sun was about to set, and Jesse was about to miss the plane. Or maybe what he didn't want to miss was the fate he was destined for.

title: Horror Live 더 테러 라이브
leader: ['Ha Jung-woo', 'Lee Kyung-young', 'Jeon Hye-jin', 'Lee David']
description:
On an ordinary morning in Seoul, South Korea, Yoon Young-hwa (played by Ha Jung-woo), the host of the radio station's Daily Topic program, was connecting with listeners about tax rate reform. At this time, Park Ru-gyu, an ordinary worker who claimed to live in Changshin-dong, Seoul, called and complained about the extremely high electricity bills and threats from relevant departments. Yin Yinghua was impatient and forcibly cut off the call on the grounds that it was off topic. Unexpectedly, the connection could not be interrupted unilaterally by the radio station. The angry Park Rugyu continued to complain and threatened to blow up the Han River Bridge. Yin Yinghua disagreed, and then encouraged the other party to do whatever he wanted. Unexpectedly, as soon as he finished speaking, the Mapo Bridge outside the window exploded into rubble. The frightened Yin Yinghua quickly calmed down and decided to use this rare opportunity to turn his career around.
                                    
                                Under his auspices, a live broadcast targeting terrorists began, and a program that had nothing to do with conscience kicked off...

description: The mother of a single parent, Philip Perry (T.J. Lowther), was very strict with him. The 8-year-old Philip had never even participated in a ghost festival begging for candy. Two criminals from a nearby state prison successfully escaped, took Philip as a hostage, and fled toward the Texas border. On the way, one of the criminals, Butch (Kevin Costner), killed his reckless and stupid accomplice, but took good care of little Philip. At the same time, Texas police detective Reid (Clint Eastwood) led his men and the governor’s crime expert Sally (Laura Dern) to quickly hunt down Butch. The two sides launched a road race in Texas; and little Philip also experienced a lot of excitement and happiness that he had never imagined, and developed an unusual relationship with Butch that was similar to that of a father and son...

title: Despicable Me Despicable Me

description: The super villain Gru (voiced by Steve Carell) was dissatisfied with the emergence of new thieves on the market after hearing the news that the Egyptian pyramids were stolen. He decided to build a rocket with the help of Dr. Nefario (voiced by Russell Brand) to steal the moon. During the loan process to the bad guy bank, the shrinking ray gun stolen by Gru was snatched away by the new thief Victor (voiced by Jason Segel). In order to regain the shrinking ray gun, Gru decided to adopt three orphans - Margot (voiced by Miranda Cosgrove), Edith (voiced by Dana Gaier) and Agnes (voiced by Elsie Fisher), and used their opportunity to enter Victor's castle to sell cookies to commit theft. After the plan was successful, he secretly disposed of the three children. However, in ordinary daily interactions, Gru found that he was increasingly inseparable from these three brats. However, such emotionalism would seriously affect the careful plan to steal the moon...

title: Monsters, Inc.

description:
We don't know that there are such a group of monsters living in such a world. They look funny, but they have to pretend to be ferocious. Because, late at night, they will quietly appear in the child's closet and scare the baby who has just fallen asleep sweetly. All because they are employees of Monster Power Company, and the children's screams are all the energy generated by the Monster Kingdom. Monsters are afraid of children, but they must make them scream. In the kingdom of monsters, they are all heroes who benefit all people.
                                        
                                    Sulley Sullivan (John Goodman) is the most outstanding employee of Monster Company. His performance is always at the top and he scares countless children into tears. He and his partner Big-Eyed Mike (Billy Crystal) are loved by everyone. By chance, Sulley accidentally brought a two-year-old girl Abu (Mary Gibbs) back to the world of monsters, causing great panic. The naughty and cute Abu scared these terrible monsters to their knees. The police are hunting for Abu, and the villain Henry (James Cobb) also plans to use Abu to carry out his evil plan to reform the factory.
                                        
                                    On the other hand, in the process of getting along with Abu, Sulley gradually developed an inexplicable affection for her, and was even exiled to the wild for this reason. But one...

title: Toy Story 3 Toy Story 3
leader: ['Tom Hanks', 'Tim Allen', 'Joan Cusack', 'Ned Beatty', 'Don Rickles', 'Michael Keaton']
description:
11 years have passed since the last adventure, and in the blink of an eye Andy (voiced by John Morris) turned into a 17-year-old sunshine boy. This summer, Andy is about to start college life. He must tidy up his room and leave it to his sister. Previously, toys such as Woody (voiced by Tom Hanks) and Buzz Lightyear (voiced by Tim Allen) had been looking forward to Andy playing with them again, but as the years went by, they were left in the box for a long time. Andy cherished these childhood playmates so much that he planned to store them in the attic. Who would have thought that my mother would throw the toys into the street as rubbish? The toys misunderstood Andy and ran away angrily, preferring to be donated to Sunshine House Kindergarten.
                                    
                                Woody tried his best to persuade everyone, but with little success, so he had to leave alone. Buzz Lightyear and the others originally thought they would return to the happy times of the past, but unexpectedly they fell into a conspiracy...

title: effort
leader: ['Stephen Chow', 'Yuan Qiu', 'Yuan Hua', 'Huang Shengyi', 'Liang Xiaolong', 'Chen Guokkun', 'Tian Qiwen', 'Lin Zicong', 'Lin Xue', 'Feng Ke'an', 'Shi Yanneng', 'Feng Xiaogang', 'Yuan Xiangren', 'Zhang Yibai', 'Zhao Zhiling', 'Dong Zhihua', 'He Wenhui', 'Chen Kaishi', 'Jia Kangxi', 'Lin Zishan', 'Ren Jiarui', 'Wang Shiying']
description:
In Shanghai in the 1940s, Ah Xing (Stephen Chow), a street gangster who had been bullied since childhood, snuck into the cracks of opportunity in order to get ahead. This time, he targeted the increasingly rampant underworld force "Ax Gang" and wanted to use his fame to achieve great success.
                                    
                                Axing pretended to be a member of the "Ax Gang" and tried to blackmail the residents in a place called "Pig Cage Walled City", not wanting to cause grievances between the real "Axe Gang" and the residents of the "Pig Cage Walled City". The "Pig Cage Walled City" was originally a place where dragons and tigers were hidden. There were many people with special skills among the residents (Yuan Hua, Liang Xiaolong, etc.). They hid here to stay away from the grudges of the world. While watching the struggle between good and evil factions, A Xing gradually understood the true meaning of kung fu.

title: Hacksaw Ridge
leader: ['Andrew Garfield', 'Sam Worthington', 'Vince Vaughn', 'Hugo Weaving', 'Luke Bracey', 'Teresa Palmer', 'Rachel Griffith', 'Nathaniel Buzonik', 'Richard Losberg', 'Matt Nafley', 'Ferras Dirani', 'Ryan Cole', 'Luke Pegler']
description:
In 1945, the Second World War was coming to an end. Japan, as an important member of the Axis of Evil, had reached the end of its arrogance. That year, the Battle of Okinawa, which determined the direction of the war, kicked off. up arms. His name is Desmond Dawes (Andrew Garfield) and he comes from Virginia, the United States. When the Pacific Ocean broke out, the thin Desmond volunteered to be a military doctor who could save lives and enlist in the army. However, due to childhood and family reasons, he was never willing to pick up a gun and practice. For this reason, he would rather be charged with objecting to military service and be sent to a military court. After many twists and turns, Desmond and his comrades finally came to Hacksaw Ridge. There was a hail of bullets, and countless people fell to the ground in an instant. With the support of faith and conviction, Desmond single-handedly saved dozens of dying lives...
                                    
                                This film is adapted from a true story.

title: Nausicaa of the Valley of the Wind Nausicaa of the Valley of the Wind

description:
The rapid development of industrial civilization eventually brought disaster. A seven-day Zerg war of destruction destroyed human civilization. A thousand years later, the legacy of industrial civilization still plagues the planet. Plants with strong toxicity form the prohibitive "Sea of ​​Corruption" forest. As time goes by, the Sea of ​​Corruption spreads in an orderly manner, eating away at the surrounding world. wind. The heroine Nausicaä and her tribe relied on the power of the sea breeze to resist the erosion of poisonous spores and lived a peaceful and peaceful life.
                                    
                                Until one day, the war burned here. The Western power Trome wants to re-establish human hegemony. They plan to unify the surrounding countries and then launch a general attack on the Zerg. On the other hand, the ancient monster "Monster" that led the destruction of mankind a thousand years ago has reappeared in the world. The war of destruction is about to begin, what will be the fate of mankind...
                                    
                                The film is adapted from Hayao Miyazaki's manga of the same name, and won the 1985 Rome Fantasy Film Festival, the 1985 Film Weekly Best Film Award, and the 1985 Mainichi Movie Noburo Oto Award.

title: Pride & Prejudice Pride & Prejudice

description:
Based on Jane Austen's novel of the same name. Elizabeth Bennet (played by Keira Knightley) was born into a small landowner family and has four sisters. Her mother, Mrs. Bennet, worries about finding a satisfactory husband for her daughter all day long. The new neighbor Mr. Bingley and his friend Darcy (Matthew Macfadyen) break up the family's monotonous country life. Bingle and Elizabeth's sister Jane Bennet had a mutual affection; Darcy developed a liking for the kind and intelligent Elizabeth, but Elizabeth was prejudiced against Darcy's arrogance and did not accept his feelings. However, things are unpredictable, and the relationship between Bingle and Jane Bennet is in danger due to misunderstanding. Darcy's various actions show the same kind side of his character as Elizabeth, and gradually wins Elizabeth's favor. Can two pairs of lovers finally get married? Can the Bennet sisters get the life they want?
                                    
                                The British rural life and social scene in the early 19th century described by Jane Austen are re-presented on the big screen.

title: fruit of life fruit of life
leader: ['Shuichi Tsutata', 'Eiko Tsutata', 'Shuki Lin']
description:
An extremely touching documentary film "Life of Accumulated Time", shot by Japanese director Kenyuki Fukuhara, with Japanese movie queen Shirin Kiki as the narrator, a documentary about the life of the Japanese modern Tao Yuanming and his wife. Through the rich life experiences of Shuichi Tsuda and his wife, a cabin deep in the woods, we can explore the real treasures hidden in the long river of time.
                                        
                                    An extremely touching documentary film, shot by Japanese director Kenyuki Fukuhara, who had a background in journalism. After visiting the thatched cottage three times, he finally received the nod of "We are willing to assist" from the reclusive mountain architect Shuichi Tsubata and his wife Eiko with four letters, and began to shoot the film.
                                        
                                    A small house deep in the forest is located in a corner of Kozoji New Town, Japan. It was built by architect Shuichi Tsuba based on the proud wooden house of his master Anthony Raymond. There are thousands of scenery throughout the year, and hundreds of fruits and vegetables planted in the garden have become delicacies through the skillful hands of his wife Eiko. Whether cooking, tailoring, or farming, nothing could stop her. Their homes are full of thoughtfulness and care, confirming the famous saying of the architect Kobe Bryant, "A house should be a treasure box of life."
                                        
                                    Shuichi Tsubata was the chief architect of the Japan Housing Corporation. In the 1960s, he proposed to preserve the woods to clear the way for the wind...

description: Tim (Domhnall Gleeson) is 21 years old. His father (Bill Nighy) tells him that the men in his family have the super power of time travel and can go back to the past. So Tim gave it a try suspiciously and returned to the summer, where he tried to change his relationship with his crush, but found that no matter how he traveled through time and space, he couldn't make someone who didn't love you fall in love with you. After that Tim came to London and became a lawyer. He fell in love with a beautiful girl Mary (Rachel McAdams), and through several time travels, he tried hard to become Mary's boyfriend. Later, he tried to save a failed drama through time travel, to improve his sister's life, to get along better with relatives and friends, and to spend every day of his life.

title: City of God Cidade de Deus

The slums of Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, are the "City of God" and a place where even the devil would sigh and turn around.
                                        
                                    A Pao (played by Alexandre Rodrigues) took us here. He witnessed the chaotic life here for more than years, which was wrapped up in cruelty, greed, revenge, ambition, betrayal, and plunder, and ultimately led to a disastrous gang war. Although he has been among gangsters since he was a child to survive, his timid character and self-protection instinct have allowed him to live peacefully.
                                        
                                    In the early 1960s, Ah Mao, Ah Jia and Ah Dai were the "Three Young Heroes" here. After robbing the hotel, the three of them parted ways. Ah Jia returned to the embrace of God, while Ah Dai and Ah Dai paid the price with their lives.
                                        
                                    In the 1970s, Xiaodouzi (Douglas Silva), a younger brother of the "Three Young Heroes", relied on his ruthlessness to constantly annex other people's territory and became the "little overlord" in the slums. His business also upgraded from robbery to a more profitable drug trade. Benny (Phellipe Haagensen) also prospered with him.
                                        
                                    Benny met the beautiful Ann...

title: The Godfather: Part III

description:
In the blink of an eye, it is already 1979. The second-generation godfather, Mike Corleone (played by Al Pacino), is in his twilight years. In order to save his soul, Mike slowly ends his family's underworld business and switches to legitimate business.
                                    
                                Michael's son Tony loves art and has no intention of taking over the family business. Michael decides to let his eldest brother Sunni's illegitimate son, the hot and lustful Vincent (Andy Garcia), inherit the family business and become the third generation godfather. Mike's daughter Mary (played by Sofia Coppola) falls in love with Vincent, but her father opposes it, and father and daughter gradually become estranged.
                                    
                                In order to legalize the family assets, Mike prepared to invest in the "Standing" Group through his network in the Vatican. However, he was secretly obstructed by his enemies. The death of the Pope also made things more complicated and confusing.
                                    
                                In desperation, Mike could only choose to use violence to solve the problem again, and his relatives were also involved in this bloody storm.

title: Book of Heaven and Strange Tales

There is a rare book "Book of Heaven" in heaven, which has been locked in a stone niche for three thousand years. Duke Yuan, who was guarding the Book of Heaven, was very curious about the contents of the Book of Heaven. He secretly took it out to read when no one was around. It turns out that there are 108 magic spells recorded in the Heavenly Book. move, which was intended to benefit mankind, violated the laws of heaven and was punished by the Jade Emperor.
                                    
                                The elixir in the alchemy furnace was accidentally eaten by three foxes. They turned into spirits and defrauded people of their money.

title: Saw

description:
Adam (Leigh Whannell) wakes up and finds himself trapped in an abandoned toilet. Opposite him is Lawrence (Cary Elwes) who has the same fate - their legs were tied with chains, and they were surprised to find a terrifying dead man lying between them. The dead man was dripping with blood, holding a video player in his left hand and a gun in his right hand.
                                    
                                Someone put a tape into Adam's pocket, and he quickly put it into the VCR. The tape said that Lawrence must kill Adam before 6 o'clock tonight, otherwise the two of them will die together, and Lawrence's family will not be spared. The blood flowing from the dead man in front of him was extremely poisonous.
                                    
                                A bloody death game begins. In the little time left, they must find clues and escape from hell. At the last moment, when they thought they would see the light of day again, a new round of nightmare had just begun.

title: wedding banquet

description:
Wei Tong (Zhao Wenxuan) is a successful gay man who lives happily together with his boyfriend Simon (Mitchell Lichtenstein) in the United States. His troubles come from having to use various tricks to deal with forced marriages from his parents (Lang Xiong) and mother (Gui Yalei) who are far away in Taipei. Wei Tong was forced to write a letter as a "good boy" claiming that he would get married in the United States. Unexpectedly, his parents wanted to witness it with their own eyes. Helpless, he had no choice but to marry Weiwei (Jin Sumei), an unsuccessful female artist from Shanghai, in a "fake marriage" in order to escape.
                                    
                                The parents were quite satisfied with Weiwei, but were dissatisfied with Wei Tong's hasty attitude. In order to satisfy his parents and return to Taipei as soon as possible, Wei Tong, like a "desperate man", tried his best. But God is not as good as man, and constant twists and turns have delayed his parents' return to Taiwan again and again, causing a "red light" in his relationship with Simon, and Weiwei unexpectedly became pregnant with his child. It seems that in The face of powerful parents (tradition), Wei Tong can only choose to be a "appearing normal" man.

title: The true nature of a hero

description: Song Zihao (played by Ti Lung) and Mark (played by Chow Yun-fat), important members of an international counterfeit banknote syndicate in Hong Kong, are brothers. When Song Zihao took his subordinate Tan Cheng (played by Li Zixiong) to Taipei for business, he was betrayed by Tan Cheng (played by Li Zixiong) and was shot and imprisoned. In order to avenge his good brother, Mark went to Taiwan alone, but was beaten into a cripple. His status in the world plummeted, and Song Zihao's father also died soon. Song Zijie (Leslie Cheung), who has always regarded Song Zihao as his idol, learned about his brother's true identity and hated the underworld and him. He vowed to use his identity as a police officer to eradicate the gangs. After Song Zihao was released from prison, he ignored the dissuasion of Mark who was waiting for him and wanted to restore his glory. At this time, Tan Cheng, who has become the gang boss, wanted to cooperate with Song Zihao again. After being rejected, he threatened to harm Song Zijie. He was forced to have no choice but to join hands with Mark to fight against the powerful enemy.

title: Django Unchained Django Unchained
leader: ['Jamie Foxx', 'Leonardo DiCaprio', 'Christoph Waltz', 'Samuel L. Jackson', 'Kerry Washington', 'Walton Goggins', 'Dennis Christopher', 'Jonah Hill', 'James Remar', 'Amber Tamblyn', 'Franco Nero', 'Robert Carradine', 'Zoe Bell']
description:
1858, two years before the American Civil War. German bounty hunter Kim Schultz (Christoph Waltz) buys the black slave Django (Jamie Foxx) from a slave trader and allows him to regain his freedom. Schultz actually wanted to train Django to be a lawless bounty hunter who would hunt down various wanted criminals in exchange for rewards. Django's only condition is to rescue his wife Broomhilda (Kerry Washington) from the cruel candy manor owner Calvin Candy (Leonardo DiCaprio). This film is Tarantino's tribute to the 1966 classic Italian Western "Diego" directed by Sergio Corbusi.
                                        
                                    The genius director Quentin has been sharpening his skills for three years and has produced another masterpiece after "Inglourious Basterds". This film continues Quentin's consistent low-key and luxurious style, with whimsical humor elements and bloody and wild action scenes everywhere. It also has powerful group scenes and a luxurious cast, making it full of attractions.
                                        
                                    "Django Unchained" won the 85th Oscars...

title: The Bourne Ultimatum

After losing his beloved woman, Bonn (played by Matt Damon) is facing a more difficult life. He tries to remember, but he can only be awakened by flashbacks that he barely understands in his sleep, and he still cannot remember his identity.

After several consecutive battles, Jason Bourne was finally completely irritated and decided to fight back - he took the initiative to pursue the killer and traveled to Moscow and Madrid. Paris, and also made stops in London and Tangier.
                                    
                                As the problems are solved one by one, Jason returns to New York, where he will find all the answers and regain his identity.

title: The Godfather: Part Ⅱ

The journey of questioning the evil is accompanied by the angel's journey of healing. Can the beautiful girl show a bright smile again?
